title: Lane F: Monolith Extraction — Split 4 largest files into focused modules
consumer_purpose: Improve maintainability of the renderer codebase by splitting 4 monolith files into focused, composable modules without behavior changes
claim_atoms: message-part.tsx split into message-part/ directory with re-exports preserving all 27 exports
layout.tsx size reduced via seam extraction to existing layout/ subdirectory
session.tsx size reduced via seam extraction to existing session/ subdirectory
prompt-input.tsx size reduced by extracting remaining seams
all existing imports continue to work unchanged
bun typecheck passes from packages/app and packages/ui
no behavior changes — pure structural refactor
content:
## Monolith Extraction Plan

### Overview
Four largest files in the renderer/pages hierarchy need structural splitting into focused modules. No behavior changes. Pure refactor.

### File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/message-part.tsx` (2,414 lines)
**Current state**: 94 symbols, 27 exports, companion files already exist (message-part-text.ts, message-file.ts)
**Plan**: Create `packages/ui/src/components/message-part/` directory with split files.

Extract into these files:
- `message-part/types.ts` — All type/interface exports
- `message-part/clipboard.ts` — writeClipboard utility
- `message-part/diagnostics.tsx` — Diagnostic types, getDiagnostics, DiagnosticsDisplay, ShellSubmessage
- `message-part/pacing.tsx` — createPacedValue, PacedMarkdown
- `message-part/tool-info.ts` — getToolInfo, agentTitle, etc.
- `message-part/grouping.ts` — PartRef, PartGroup types and helpers
- `message-part/message.tsx` — Message, AssistantMessageDisplay, ContextToolGroup, UserMessageDisplay components
- `message-part/part-registry.ts` — PART_MAPPING, registerPartComponent, Part
- `message-part/highlighted-text.tsx` — HighlightedText component
- `message-part/tool-file-accordion.tsx` — ToolFileAccordion
- `message-part/part-components.tsx` — All PART_MAPPING entry component dispatchers
- `message-part/index.ts` — Barrel re-export of all 27 exports

Original `message-part.tsx` becomes a thin re-exporter.

### File 2: `packages/app/src/components/prompt-input.tsx` (2,172 lines)
Further reduce by extracting remaining inline types and logic to existing prompt-input/ subdirectory.

### File 3: `packages/app/src/pages/layout.tsx` (2,620 lines)
Further extract seams to existing layout/ subdirectory.

### File 4: `packages/app/src/pages/session.tsx` (1,845 lines)
Further extract seams to existing session/ subdirectory.

### Verification
- `cd packages/ui && bun typecheck` after message-part split
- `cd packages/app && bun typecheck` after all splits
- existing tests pass
